author: aryanbhosale
name: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + MuonEq-R + Full GPTQ
blurb: 4096-vocab (sp4096) + MLP 4x + WD 0.090 + depth recurrence (layers 4,5) + MuonEq-R + full GPTQ int6 + brotli + selective pruning. 3-seed mean: 1.09398 BPB, beating merged SOTA (PR #1019, 1.11474 BPB) by 0.02076 BPB (Welch t=-61.9).
